full_text:
Deng Cheng 鄧程
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Deng Cheng (鄧程). Received the royal seal of the deposed Sun Liang. Deng Cheng is a fictional character. Deng Cheng was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
